notes: Gizmo: flip the Y (green, vertical) rotation direction. After the v0.0.23 Y-up gizmo fix, the user confirmed on-device that the green ring rotated the wrong way; the world-Y rotation delta is now +delta (was -delta) so dragging the green ring spins the object the intuitive direction around the vertical axis. X (red) and Z (blue) were already correct. Builds on v0.0.23.
